name: Veal Cutlets in Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook veal cutlets in margarine in a frying pan, browning both sides well.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper as desired.
3. Add more margarine to the pan if needed.
4. Transfer the veal cutlets to another container to keep warm.
5. To prepare the wine sauce:
a. Melt butter in the same frying pan.
b. Mix in flour, salt, pepper, and bouillon powder.
c. Stir in milk and white wine until it boils and thickens.
6. Spoon 2 tablespoons of sauce onto the center of each warm dinner plate.
7. Place a veal cutlet on top of the sauce.
8. Divide the remaining sauce over the top of each dish.
9. Serves 8.
